title: Boyd, Steven - Chief Executive, Government Property Agency - ACOBA advice
body: "Mr Boyd left his role at the Government Property Agency in November 2023  Major Programme Advisor, AtkinsRéalis  Mr Boyd sought the Committee’s advice about taking up a role with AtkinsRéalis. The letter  containing the Committee’s consideration and the conditions imposed on the appointment was sent in January 2025; and the appointment was taken up later that month. An accessible version of the letter is available here.  Independent Steering Group Member, ADS Alliance  Mr Boyd sought the Committee’s advice about taking up a role with ADS Alliance. The letter containing the Committee’s consideration and the conditions imposed on the appointment was sent in December 2024; and the appointment was taken up later that month. An accessible version of the letter is available here.  Consultant, Total Flow  Mr Boyd sought the Committee’s advice about taking up a role with Total Flow. The letter containing the Committee’s consideration and the conditions imposed on the appointment was sent in November 2024; and the appointment was taken up later that month. An accessible version of the letter is available here.  Consultant, Public Finances Directorate General, Ministry of Economics, Finance and Industrial and Digital Sovereignty, Government of France.  Mr Boyd sought the Committee’s advice about taking up a role with the Government of France. The letter containing the Committee’s consideration and the conditions imposed on the appointment was sent in June 2024; and the appointment was taken up in November 2024. An accessible version of the letter is available here.  Strategic Advisor, Glider Technology Limited  Mr Boyd sought the Committee’s advice about taking up a role with Glider Technology Limited. The letter containing the Committee’s consideration and the conditions imposed on the appointment was sent in September 2024; and the appointment was taken up later that month An accessible version of the letter is available here.  Non Executive Advisor, Cambridge Management Consulting  Mr Boyd sought the Committee’s advice about taking up a role with Cambridge Management Consulting.The letter containing the Committee’s consideration and the conditions imposed on the appointment was sent in June 2024; and the appointment was taken up in July 2024. An accessible version of the letter is available here.’  "
